prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring oversized BLACK smartwatch, ultra-clean design. A young Man in all-white and yellow outfit leans casually against the giant watch, relaxed confident pose, eyes open in excitement expression , also wearing the same smartwatch on his wrist. Soft gradient blue background with large bold white “SMASUNG” text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high-end fashion/product photography. Small top-right text “Designed by Shamus”. Bottom center tagline in small white font: “TIME IS TIDE.”
